title: IMPORTANCE AND CHARACTERISTICS OF USING NEW METHODS IN ENGLISH FOR STUDENTS OF PRIMARY SCHOOLS
author: Eronova Umida Mirzakulovna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Improving the modern goals, content and technologies of teaching English in primary education, a textbook that serves to generalize the traditional and foreign experience gained in the practice of teaching English to primary school students Due to the lack of applications, insufficient efficiency is achieved in the training of teachers for this field. This article describes the importance and features of the use of new methods in English for primary school students.Improving the modern goals, content and technologies of teaching English in primary education, a textbook that serves to generalize the traditional and foreign experience gained in the practice of teaching English to primary school students Due to the lack of applications, insufficient efficiency is achieved in the training of teachers for this field. This article describes the importance and features of the use of new methods in English for primary school students.
